data.body: LIVE VALIDATION (user-requested before epic close): bridge-probe PASS all 6 steps (CREATE/LABEL/PROPERTY_WRITE/JQL_SEARCH/PROPERTY_READ/DELETE — self-cleaned). Running live external suite (REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL=1): test_reconcile_live, test_link_sync_live, test_link_sync_roundtrip_live, test_verified_fake_contract_live — validates aff0 probe + 625b field diff + eefd link diff + ad44 reconcile_check + widened Backend protocol against real Jira. CLEANUP REQUIREMENT (user): verify ALL test tickets removed from BOTH Jira AND rebar store after. Baseline rebar store = 1397 tickets. Will re-count + Jira JQL scan post-run + clean any leftovers before closing ad44/epic. ad44 (945) MERGED, on origin/main; NOT yet closed (pending live validation).
